heroSection.title: Invest in Saudi Real Estate
heroSection.subtitle: from 100 SAR Only
heroSection.description: Start your investment journey in Saudi real estate easily and safely. Invest in real properties through CapNest platform regulated by the Capital Market Authority (REGA). From owning zero assets to owning assets in under 3 minutes (120 seconds).

howItWorksSection.title: How Investing Works
howItWorksSection.subtitle: Start building your real estate portfolio in three simple steps. No complexity, no hassle.
howItWorksSection.step1Description: Create your free account and fill in your basic details to join the waiting list.
howItWorksSection.step2Description: Browse the first available property through Digishares and choose your investment share.
howItWorksSection.step3Description: Invest and start earning monthly returns from your real estate investments.

benefitsSection.title: Benefits of Fractional Ownership
benefitsSection.description: Experience the advantages of real estate investment without the traditional obstacles.
benefitsSection.benefit1Description: Start building your portfolio from just 100 SAR. No massive down payments required.
benefitsSection.benefit2Description: Spread your investment across multiple properties to reduce risk and maximize returns.
benefitsSection.benefit3Description: All investments are fully compliant with SEC regulations, ensuring your money is protected.
benefitsSection.benefit4Description: Our expert team handles property management, tenants, and maintenance – you just earn.
benefitsSection.benefit5Description: Receive your share of rental income directly to your account every month.
benefitsSection.benefit6Description: Access premium properties nationwide from the comfort of your home.

ctaSection.title: Ready to Build Your
ctaSection.subtitle: Real Estate Portfolio?
ctaSection.description: Join thousands of investors earning passive income through fractional property ownership. Start your journey today.
ctaSection.noCreditCard: No credit card required • Start investing in minutes
